arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ تَرَى وَلَا تُرَى وَأَنْتَ بِالْمَنْظَرِ الْأَعْلَى وَإِلَيْكَ الْمُنْتَهَى وَإِلَيْكَ الرُّجْعَى وَإِلَيْكَ رُفِعَتِ الْأَبْصَارُ نَحْوَكَ
alt_text: Arabic du'a: 'O Allah, You see and are not seen, and You are at the highest vantage; to You is the final destination, to You is the return, and toward You eyes are raised.' A traditional devotional invocation.
notes: Devotional du'a affirming divine transcendence and the eschatological return. Not a Quran verse.
